installCommand: bun install --cwd backend && bun install --cwd frontend

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://vercel.live; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://ep-rough-dust-an6dybh2.neonauth.c-6.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech;
